name: citadel
description: Citadel — All-In-One DayZ server management tool with web UI, Discord bot, Live Map, and in-game admin mod

scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../web/frontend && npm install
scripts.start: node backend/lib/setup.js && node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('web/dist/index.html')){process.exit(1)}" || (cd web/frontend && npm run build && cd ../..) && node backend/server.js
scripts.dev: node backend/lib/setup.js && concurrently "node backend/server.js" "cd web/frontend && npx vite --host 127.0.0.1"
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../web/frontend && npm run lint
